caption: A person wearing a white short-sleeved shirt and matching white trousers walks through an indoor facility. Initially, they move past a white box and a door with a dark panel, heading toward a staircase. As they proceed, they grasp a wooden handrail to ascend the stairs. In the final sequence, the person is seen from behind walking down a long, sterile hallway with light-colored walls and a gray floor. A blue object is visible against the wall on the right side of the corridor. The setting appears to be a medical or institutional environment, characterized by brick-patterned walls and functional lighting. The person remains the sole individual visible throughout the sequence, maintaining a consistent direction of movement from the initial room, up the stairs, and into the hallway.
